nodes.name: issue.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Zod schema library defining all validation shapes for issues, including creation, updates, execution state, thread interactions, comments, approval links, and document upserts used across both server and client.
nodes.languageNotes: Exports 60 named Zod schemas with two helper functions that resolve default status values at parse time using z.preprocess.

nodes.name: resolveCreateIssueStatusDefault
nodes.summary: Resolves the default issue status value from an input object by inspecting multiple fields, used during preprocess in createIssueInputSchema.

nodes.name: withCreateIssueStatusDefault
nodes.summary: Wraps a Zod schema with a preprocessing step that injects the resolved default issue status before validation runs.

nodes.name: routine.ts
nodes.summary: Zod schema definitions for routine creation, updating, triggers, revision snapshots, and execution, shared across the platform for consistent routine API validation.

nodes.name: agent-auth-jwt.ts
nodes.summary: Implements a lightweight HMAC-SHA256 JWT mechanism for authenticating local agent runs, providing createLocalAgentJwt and verifyLocalAgentJwt without any external JWT library dependency.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Node's built-in crypto module with timing-safe comparison to prevent signature oracle attacks.

nodes.name: createLocalAgentJwt
nodes.summary: Creates a signed JWT containing agentId, companyId, adapterType, and runId claims with configurable expiry for local agent authentication.

nodes.name: verifyLocalAgentJwt
nodes.summary: Verifies and decodes a local agent JWT, checking signature integrity with timing-safe comparison and validating the expiry claim.

nodes.name: auth-utils.ts
nodes.summary: Authentication utility helpers for resolving user sessions, deriving trusted origins, and providing middleware that extracts principal identity from incoming requests.

nodes.name: cloud-upstream.ts
nodes.summary: Manages cloud upstream run lifecycle — dispatching runs to remote Paperclip instances, polling for completion, and reconciling orphaned upstream runs on server startup.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Main server entry point that bootstraps the full Paperclip platform: initializes the database (with optional embedded Postgres), runs migrations, configures auth, mounts all route handlers, starts heartbeat and routine schedulers, and binds the HTTP server.
nodes.languageNotes: The startServer function is nearly 900 lines long and handles both cloud and embedded-Postgres deployment modes, demonstrating the breadth of the server's initialization responsibilities.

nodes.name: startServer
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the entire server startup sequence including database setup, migrations, auth configuration, route mounting, heartbeat scheduling, and HTTP listener binding.

nodes.name: routine-runner.ts
nodes.summary: Implements the routine scheduling service that ticks cron-based triggers, creates run entries for due routines, and manages the lifecycle of scheduled recurring agent tasks.

nodes.name: agents.ts
nodes.summary: Defines all Express routes for agent management including CRUD, adapter configuration, skill management, run lifecycle (create/list/read/logs), org-chart rendering, and heartbeat scheduler administration.
nodes.languageNotes: The agentRoutes factory spans 3300+ lines — the largest single route file in the server, handling every agent-related API endpoint.

nodes.name: agentRoutes
nodes.summary: Factory function that mounts all agent-related REST endpoints onto an Express router, covering full agent lifecycle from creation through deletion plus run management.

nodes.name: approvals.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for the issue approval workflow — listing, creating, approving, rejecting, and cancelling approval requests associated with agent runs.

nodes.name: approvalRoutes
nodes.summary: Mounts approval workflow endpoints for issue thread interactions and approval payloads onto an Express router.

nodes.name: board-auth.ts
nodes.summary: Handles board-level authentication routes including API key issuance and CLI auth challenge flow for connecting external boards to the Paperclip instance.

nodes.name: companies.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for company management including creation, listing, member management, import/export triggering, and cloud-tenant company provisioning.

nodes.name: companyRoutes
nodes.summary: Mounts all company CRUD and management endpoints onto an Express router, including import/export and member role operations.

nodes.name: goals.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for company goals management — listing, creating, updating, and deleting goals that provide high-level objectives for agent companies.

nodes.name: issues.ts
nodes.summary: The largest route file in the server, handling the full issue lifecycle: creation, assignment, execution state transitions, comments, thread interactions, document management, attachments, and recovery actions.
nodes.languageNotes: Contains 33 helper functions alongside the main issueRoutes factory, reflecting the breadth of issue-related operations across the platform.

nodes.name: issueRoutes
nodes.summary: Mounts all issue endpoints onto an Express router, covering the complete issue lifecycle from creation through execution, comments, and document management.

nodes.name: plugins.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for plugin management: listing, installing, updating, uninstalling, and managing plugin configuration including examples and development mode plugin loading.

nodes.name: pluginRoutes
nodes.summary: Mounts all plugin lifecycle endpoints onto an Express router, handling install, update, delete, and configuration for both bundled and external plugins.

nodes.name: projects.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for project management — CRUD operations on projects that group issues and provide workspace context for agent execution.

nodes.name: resource-memberships.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for managing resource-level memberships that control which agents or users can access specific projects or goals.

nodes.name: routines.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for routine management: creating, updating, deleting routines and their triggers, listing runs, and manually triggering routine execution.

nodes.name: runs.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for run lifecycle management — listing, reading, and aborting agent execution runs across companies.

nodes.name: secrets.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for managing secrets used in agent adapter configuration — listing, creating, updating, and deleting named secret values stored securely.

nodes.name: users.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for user profile operations — reading current user info, updating display name and preferences, and managing user roles.

nodes.name: workspaces.ts
nodes.summary: Express routes for execution workspace management — listing, creating, and managing the runtime workspaces where agent runs execute, including workspace operation logs and session state.

nodes.name: board-auth.ts
nodes.summary: Service implementing board authentication: token hashing, API key creation and expiry, CLI auth challenge lifecycle, and the main boardAuthService factory that provides persistence-backed token management.

nodes.name: boardAuthService
nodes.summary: Factory that creates the board authentication service with database-backed methods for issuing/revoking API keys, managing CLI auth challenges, and verifying board credentials.

nodes.name: company-export.ts
nodes.summary: Implements company data export — serializing company configuration, agents, goals, projects, routines, and issues into a portable bundle for cross-instance portability.

nodes.name: company-import.ts
nodes.summary: Implements company data import — deserializing and persisting a portable company bundle including agents, goals, projects, routines, and issues into the target Paperclip instance.

nodes.name: heartbeat.ts
nodes.summary: The core runtime health and orchestration service that reaps orphaned runs, promotes scheduled retries, resumes queued runs, reconciles stranded issues, manages liveness checks, and processes productivity reviews on a periodic tick.
nodes.languageNotes: With 91 functions and 34 exports, this is the most complex single file in the server — it is the beating heart of the Paperclip agent orchestration runtime.

nodes.name: heartbeatService
nodes.summary: Factory that creates the heartbeat service instance with all orchestration methods: run reaping, retry promotion, queue resumption, strandedness reconciliation, liveness checks, and productivity review scanning.
